channel.title: Muhammad Ul Hasnain — Blog
channel.description: Articles on cryptocurrency trading bots, AI automation, API development, web scraping, and modern full-stack development.

item.title: Web Scraping for Competitive Intelligence: Legal & Effective Strategies for 2026
item.description: Legal web scraping guide for Australian & USA businesses. Learn Selenium, Beautiful Soup techniques for competitive intelligence while staying compliant.

item.title: Building a High-Converting E-commerce Website: A 2026 Guide for Australian and American Entrepreneurs
item.description: Complete 2026 guide to building high-converting e-commerce websites for Australia & USA. Platform comparison, payment integration, and conversion optimization strategies.

item.title: Personal Branding in 2026: Why Freelancers and Professionals Need a Portfolio Website
item.description: Why freelancers and professionals need portfolio websites in 2026. Personal branding tips, essential features, and React portfolio development guide for Australia & USA.

item.title: REST API Development: The Backbone of Modern Web Applications
item.description: Complete guide to REST API development with Django. Learn JWT authentication, database design & API best practices for Australian & USA businesses.

item.title: Google Maps Integration: Boost Your Local Business Visibility in 2026
item.description: Complete guide to Google Maps API integration for local businesses in Australia & USA. Store locators, directions, and local SEO strategies for 2026.

item.title: AI Automation: How American and Australian Businesses Can Save 20+ Hours Per Week
item.description: Save 20+ hours weekly with AI automation. Guide for Australian & USA businesses on implementing Gemini API, ChatGPT & custom AI for real productivity gains.

item.title: Why Every Australian Small Business Needs a Professional Website in 2026
item.description: Why Australian & USA small businesses need professional websites in 2026. ROI data, essential features & custom React development vs DIY builders compared.

item.title: How Automated Trading Bots Are Revolutionizing Cryptocurrency Trading in 2026
item.description: Learn how crypto trading bots automate TradingView strategies on Bybit, Binance & more. Complete guide to automated trading in 2026 for Australia & USA traders.
